A carbon-black, six-passenger craft with a needle-like body and, disproportionate, down sloping stabilizers, the '''LightStealth-18 Reconnaissance Ship''' ('''LSR''' for short) was the closest anyone had come to producing a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] capable of hiding itself even while it was scanning.

Unlike most ships designed by [[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]], [[Section 19|Imperial Section 19]] or [[Warthan's Wizards/Legends|Warthan's Wizards]] during the days of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the LSR was not [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaked]], but was instead built for silent running and incredible speed. With an abundance low-profile [[Rectenna/Legends|rectennae]] and packed with signal augmented [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] [[Jammer/Legends|jammers]], [[Blind-band hypercomm transmitter]]s, [[crystal gravfield trap]]s, and a power core more suitable to a ship of the line, the LSR could all but see [[The galaxy/Legends|the universe]] to its own aft and could outrun nearly anything that could locate it. It has a class 1 hyper drive. It also had a forward mounted laser cannon for defense.

Though the LightStealth-18 Reconnaissance ship was designed by Raith Sienar, it was oddly produced, for the most part, by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
